name: lowlands-missinglettr-seo-2026-07
task: Create a reusable Storytellers HyperFrames SEO video campaign from E:\lowlands\client-content\drive-lowlands-pics-2026-07-17. Deliver 4 keyword-targeted 35-60 second videos and 24 standalone 15-30 second vertical Shorts with voiceover scripts, burned-in captions, YouTube metadata, thumbnail notes, Missinglettr copy, and a CSV or JSON manifest. Use HyperFrames general-video, keep source assets read-only, select 12-18 strong images, use MOV as B-roll, maintain warm rustic branding and the CTA Check availability for your date. Build and approve one pilot main video plus two Shorts before rendering the remainder. Do not add dependencies unless the existing toolchain cannot render the outputs; keep commercial audio licensing and API secrets safe.
